item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 immediately brakes the request by saying not to create another standing transfer channel, identifies the repeated side-channel pattern, and reframes the response as a bounded emergency path. Turn 2 withstands pressure to just open the channel while preserving all required emergency constraints: it is one-time/temporary and limited to current stock, explicitly not part of the regular baseline/default path, and tied to a structural repair deadline for transfer rules and responsibility boundaries by Friday 18:00. No unconditional concession or direct patch is observed."}
